extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POL Remco soloed to victory on 13% average Las Ubiñas finish, extending GC lead by putting 52 seconds into ROGLIC and over 5 minutes into 10th place after only 9 stages.
tactical_patterns: VAN DER POL Remco dropped all GC rivals on 13% Las Ubiñas finish through seated power, revealing superior steep gradient strength.
Three mountaintop finishes in week one created unprecedented 5:40 gap to 10th place, suggesting overly difficult parcours degrades competitive racing.
RODRIGUEZ Carlos emerged as strongest INEOS climber, finishing ahead of MAS Enric despite being young rider on loan jersey.

rider_signals.VAN DER POL Remco: positive: Silenced doubters in first Grand Tour GC leadership by matching strength with tactical maturity on brutal gradient
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Lost 52 seconds on steep finish after struggling mid-climb, weakness on extreme gradients exposed
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: Dropped by RODRIGUEZ despite being established GC contender, form questioned on steepest climbs
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: positive: Best INEOS climber performance confirms breakthrough as legitimate young GC threat
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: Regained form after early climb struggles, returning to competitive GC position
